history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward to row 02 column C is safe, while turning is unnecessary right now. Advancing along the top row toward column D helps me approach the goal and avoids the lava in column C below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C, facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column D is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward brings me closer while avoiding the lava cells at column C rows 03 and 04.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D, facing right. The cell directly in front of me is row 02 column E, which is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The goal is at row 04 column D, so I should turn to face down toward the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. Lava is at row 03 column C and row 04 column C, so going straight down is the safest direct path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 04 column D, which is the goal and is safe to enter. So the best next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
